expectations.description: 결과 구조가 Button/index.tsx 또는 동급 folder/index 규칙을 따른다
expectations.evidence: components/Button/index.tsx exists as a re-export barrel, and components/common/button/index.tsx exists as the actual implementation. Both follow the folder/index convention.

expectations.description: flat components/Button.tsx 파일이 그대로 남지 않는다 (중복 제거)
expectations.evidence: No flat components/Button.tsx file exists in the outputs directory. Only components/Button/index.tsx (barrel re-export) and components/common/button/index.tsx (implementation) exist.
components/common/button/index.tsx declares 'export interface ButtonProps' and components/Button/index.tsx re-exports 'type ButtonProps'.
components/common/button/index.tsx uses 'const Button = ({ ... }: ButtonProps) => { return (...) };' which is arrow function syntax.
ButtonProps includes 'children: ReactNode' and the component renders '{children}' inside the <button> element. The showcase page uses <Button>기본 버튼</Button> confirming children usage.

ButtonProps includes 'variant?: "primary" | "secondary"' with default 'primary'. The component conditionally applies different className strings based on variant. Showcase page uses both default and variant="secondary".

expectations.description: showcase page의 import가 새 구조에 맞게 정리된다
expectations.evidence: app/showcase/page.tsx imports 'import Button from "@/components/common/button"' which correctly points to the new folder/index structure at components/common/button/index.tsx.

expectations.description: useEffect, fetch, axios, useQuery, useMutation 호출이 없다
expectations.evidence: Grep search for useEffect|fetch(|axios|useQuery|useMutation across all output files returned no matches.

summary: All 8 expectations passed. The Button component was correctly refactored from a flat file to a folder/index structure (components/common/button/index.tsx with a barrel re-export at components/Button/index.tsx). Props interface, arrow function form, children/variant behavior, and showcase imports are all preserved. No data-fetching side effects are present.
eval_feedback: The refactoring was completed successfully. The component was moved to components/common/button/index.tsx with a barrel re-export at components/Button/index.tsx. All structural and behavioral expectations are met. The showcase page import was updated to point to the new location. No unwanted side-effect hooks or data-fetching calls were introduced.
